activities.name: Check Error Log Table
activities.description: Check if any error records require a notification to be sent.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN COUNT(Record_ID) > 0 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS ErrorsDetected
FROM [CTL].[AVEVA_PI_ERROR_LOG]
WHERE NotificationSent = 0

@concat(
  '/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'yyyy'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'MM'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'dd'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'HH'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'mm'),'/',
  formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(),'UTC','E. Australia Standard Time'),'ss'),'/'
)

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@CONCAT('SELECT 
	SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id) AS SCHEMA_NAME,
    tab.name AS TABLE_NAME, 
	tab.type AS TYPE,
    col.name AS COLUMN_NAME, 
    col.column_id AS COLUMN_POSITION,
    t.name AS DATA_TYPE,    
    col.max_length AS LENGTH,
    col.precision AS PRECISION,
	col.scale AS SCALE,
	CASE 
		WHEN pks.column_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 0
	END AS PRIMARY_KEY_FLAG,
	pks.index_column_id AS PRIMARY_KEY_POSITION,
	NULL AS PRIMARY_KEY_SORT_ORDER
FROM (SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''Table'' AS type
	FROM sys.tables
	WHERE type = ''U''
	UNION
	SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''View'' AS type
	FROM sys.views
	WHERE is_ms_shipped = 0) tab
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col 
		ON tab.object_id = col.object_id
    LEFT JOIN 
	/*Necessary to associate custom data types to their correct system data type*/
	(SELECT stypes.*, utypes.user_type_id AS correct_user_type_id FROM 
		(SELECT * FROM sys.types
		WHERE is_user_defined = 0 and system_type_id = user_type_id) stypes 
	 INNER JOIN  sys.types utypes ON stypes.system_type_id = utypes.system_type_id)  t 
		ON col.user_type_id = t.correct_user_type_id
	LEFT JOIN (
		SELECT 
			ic.object_id
			, ic.column_id
			, ic.index_column_id
		FROM sys.indexes pk
		INNER JOIN sys.index_columns ic
			ON ic.object_id = pk.object_id
			AND ic.index_id = pk.index_id
		WHERE pk.is_primary_key = 1
	) pks ON col.object_id = pks.object_id 
		AND col.column_id = pks.column_id
WHERE SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id)=''', pipeline().parameters.pl_param_schemaName,
''' ORDER BY schema_name,
    tab.name, 
    col.column_id'
)

@CONCAT('SELECT 
	SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id) AS SCHEMA_NAME,
    tab.name AS TABLE_NAME, 
	tab.type AS TYPE,
    col.name AS COLUMN_NAME, 
    col.column_id AS COLUMN_POSITION,
    CASE
		WHEN t.name IS NOT NULL THEN t.name 
		ELSE ''nvarchar''
	END AS DATA_TYPE,    
    col.max_length AS LENGTH,
    col.precision AS PRECISION,
	col.scale AS SCALE,
	CASE 
		WHEN pks.column_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 0
	END AS PRIMARY_KEY_FLAG,
	pks.index_column_id AS PRIMARY_KEY_POSITION,
	NULL AS PRIMARY_KEY_SORT_ORDER
FROM (SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''Table'' AS type
	FROM sys.tables
	WHERE type = ''U''
	UNION
	SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''View'' AS type
	FROM sys.views
	WHERE is_ms_shipped = 0) tab
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col 
		ON tab.object_id = col.object_id
    LEFT JOIN 
	/*Necessary to associate custom data types to their correct system data type*/
	(SELECT stypes.*, utypes.user_type_id AS correct_user_type_id FROM 
		(SELECT * FROM sys.types
		WHERE is_user_defined = 0 and system_type_id = user_type_id) stypes 
	 INNER JOIN  sys.types utypes ON stypes.system_type_id = utypes.system_type_id)  t 
		ON col.user_type_id = t.correct_user_type_id
	LEFT JOIN (
		SELECT 
			ic.object_id
			, ic.column_id
			, ic.index_column_id
		FROM sys.indexes pk
		INNER JOIN sys.index_columns ic
			ON ic.object_id = pk.object_id
			AND ic.index_id = pk.index_id
		WHERE pk.is_primary_key = 1
	) pks ON col.object_id = pks.object_id 
		AND col.column_id = pks.column_id
WHERE SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id)=''', pipeline().parameters.pl_param_schemaName, 
''' AND tab.name=''', pipeline().parameters.pl_param_tableName,
''' ORDER BY schema_name,
    tab.name, 
    col.column_id'
)

scriptLines: product as ({@version} as string, amoc as (identifier as string, {issue-time-local} as ({@tz} as string, {_value_} as string), {issue-time-utc} as string, phase as string, {product-type} as string, {sent-time} as string, service as string, source as (copyright as string, disclaimer as string, office as string, region as string, sender as string), status as string), observations as (station as ({@bom-id} as integer, {@description} as string, {@forecast-district-id} as string, {@lat} as double, {@lon} as double, {@stn-height} as double, {@stn-name} as string, {@type} as string, {@tz} as string, {@wmo-id} as integer, period as ({@index} as boolean, {@time-local} as string, {@time-utc} as string, {@wind-src} as string, level as ({@index} as boolean, {@type} as string, element as ({@duration} as short, {@end-time-local} as string, {@end-time-utc} as string, {@instance} as string, {@start-time-local} as string, {@start-time-utc} as string, {@time-local} as string, {@time-utc} as string, {@type} as string, {@units} as string, {_value_} as string)[])))[]))
